title: Imagery-based Riverscapes Condition and Trend Monitoring: Protocol Development and Testing
author: Sargeant, Emily Paige
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This report describes the development and testing of a high resolution imagery-based riverscape assessment and monitoring protocol. The protocol is intended to quantitatively describe structurally complex, beaver-impacted riverscapes at the reach or site scale but is applicable to simpler reaches. The assessments within the report demonstrate the protocol's ability to assess and compare riverscape status indicators within and between multiple data capture events for a single site. These indicators broady include vegetative landcover, channel planform and network geometry, inundation extent and type, and structural complexity.
